description: Memory Bank untuk AI Coding Verbatim - berisi contoh studi yang sudah dikerjakan

numbering_convention.no_answer_others: 999 = tidak ada / sudah bagus, 99 = lainnya/tidak valid

coding_rules.nett_format: Nama Kategori - Nett (ID) / Category Name - Nett (EN)

studies.question: D2. Apa alasan Anda menyatakan kendaraan operasional Anda? Jelaskan secara detail
studies.type: OE - Open Ended, multi-column per brand, multi-code allowed

codelist.label_id: Akselerasi mesin tetap responsif meskipun dalam muatan penuh
codelist.label_en: Engine acceleration remains responsive even under full load
Wide availability of spare parts options

codelist.label_id: Performa mesin sangat bertenaga saat melewati jalan menanjak
codelist.label_en: Engine delivers strong performance when driving uphill

codelist.label_id: Kualitas lampunya diatas dari mobil biasanya
codelist.label_en: Better lighting quality than typical vehicles

codelist.label_id: Fitur interior yang fungsional membantu mengurangi tingkat kelelahan supir
codelist.label_en: Functional interior features help reduce driver fatigue

codelist.label_id: Sistem pendingin kabin (AC) berfungsi dengan baik
Memiliki radius putar yang sangat baik
Brand otomotif yang fokus pada kendaraan niaga
codelist.label_en: Automotive brand focused on commercial vehicles
Affordable price / good value (including spare parts)

codelist.label_id: Harga sesuai dengan kualitas / fasilitas yang didapat
codelist.label_en: Price matches the quality / features provided
Spare parts are easy to find / obtain
Technicians are highly competent in their field

codelist.label_id: Ada komunitas yang memudahkan untuk bertukar informasi mengenai perawatan mobil
codelist.label_en: Has a community that facilitates sharing information about vehicle maintenance
Able to compete with other brands

codelist.label_id: Mudah untuk penjualan atau tukar tambah unit
codelist.label_en: Easy to resell or trade in the vehicle
Comfortable to use / drive (cabin and seats)
Warranty coverage for damage is too short / insufficiently long

studies.question: Q9. You mentioned that you previously recommended Listerine. Please tell us the reasons why you no longer recommend this brand.
studies.type: OE - Open Ended, single column, multi-code allowed

codelist.label_en: The product is not very good.

codelist.label_id: Kurang terbukti dapat membunuh bakteri di mulut
codelist.label_en: Less proven to kill bacteria in the mouth.

codelist.label_id: Membuat iritasi jaringan mulut yang sensitif
codelist.label_en: Causes irritation to sensitive oral tissues.

codelist.label_id: Kurang dapat memberikan perlindungan harian pada gigi
codelist.label_en: Less effective in providing daily protection for teeth.
The taste is not liked by patients.

codelist.label_id: Rasanya terlalu keras / kurang lembut di mulut
codelist.label_en: The taste is too strong / not gentle enough in the mouth.

rasa obat kumur pasien tidak suka
karena ada produk yang lebih baik lagi dari kandungannya
krn mengandung alkohol,yg bisa mengiritasi jaringan mulut yg sensitif.
dari pengalaman sendiri ketika berkumur itu dimulut rasanya seperti keras sekali dan mulut sedikit kering

studies.topic: Top of Mind / Spontaneous Awareness - platform top-up game
studies.question: B4/B5. Nama platform jasa top up game yang terlintas di pikiran
studies.type: TOM - Spontaneous Brand Awareness, kode = nomor brand, single code per kolom

codelist.label_id: Langsung di game (Google Playstore/ Apple App store)
codelist.label_en: Langsung di game (Google Playstore/ Apple App store)

studies.note: Verbatim adalah nama brand yang disebut responden, kode adalah ID brand. Variasi ejaan (Codashop/codashop/CODASHOP) semua diberi kode sama.

studies.question: G8. Apa yang bisa kami perbaiki agar Anda lebih tertarik untuk top up di GoPay Games?
studies.type: OE - Open Ended, multi-code allowed, 999 = tidak ada saran

codelist.label_id: Agar selalu cepat untuk mengupdate games terbaru
codelist.label_en: Make sure the games is always up to date

codelist.label_id: Fitur di Gopay Games dibuat lebih menarik
codelist.label_en: Features in GoPay Games should be made more engaging.

codelist.label_id: Pilihan nominal top up agar lebih lengkap
Ada fitur refund saat transaksi gagal
codelist.label_en: There is a refund feature available when a transaction fails.

codelist.label_id: Perbanyak pilihan metode pembayaran saat top up
codelist.label_en: Provide more payment method options for top-up transactions.

codelist.label_id: Saat pemotongan saldo  agar jumlah  item game langsung terdeteksi di game
codelist.label_en: When the balance is deducted, ensure that the purchased game items are immediately reflected and detected in the game.

codelist.label_id: Tambahkan detail syarat dan ketentuan saat melakukan top up
codelist.label_en: Provide more detailed terms and conditions during the top-up process.

codelist.label_id: Aplikasi dan item games agar  diperbaiki biar  tidak sering eror / delay
codelist.label_en: Fix app and in-game item issues to reduce errors or delays

codelist.label_id: Agar  dapat menjaga sistemnya berjalan lebih optimal
codelist.label_en: Ensure the system runs more optimally

codelist.label_id: Navigasi aplikasi agar lebih cepat dan lengkap
codelist.label_en: Improve app navigation to be faster and more comprehensive

codelist.label_id: Agar aplikasi selalu up to date
codelist.label_en: Keep the app always up to date

codelist.label_id: Agar mengurangi penggunaan AI dalam chat
codelist.label_en: Reduce the use of AI in customer support chats.

codelist.label_id: Tambahkan riwayat top up agar mudah untuk top up ulang
codelist.label_en: Add a top-up history feature to make repeat top-ups easier.
Improve and update the overall performance of the application.

codelist.label_id: Perbaiki jaringan dan server agar lebih cepat
Perbaiki jaringan  dan server agar lebih lancar / tidak sering eror / tidak bermasalah saat pembayaran / top up
codelist.label_en: Improve network and server stability to avoid errors and issues, especially during payment or top-up

codelist.label_id: Penanganan keluhan agar lebih cepat dan baik
codelist.label_en: Handle complaints more quickly and effectively

codelist.label_id: Permudah dalam  melakukan pengembalian dana / refund
CS yang lebih responsif / cepat tanggap terhadap keluhan customer
Harga top up dibuat lebih murah / terjangkau
Harganya dibuat lebih kompetitif / bersaing dengan yang lain

Perbanyak iklan / promosi penawaran produk menarik  (seperti : diskon pengguna setia, cashback, bonus kuota, bonus diamond dan skin, reward, hadiah menarik,bundling top up, flash sale, promo perbankan,sistem point yang bisa ditukar dengan bonus top up,...dll)
codelist.label_en: Increase attractive promotions (discounts for loyal users, cashback, bonus quota, bonus diamonds and skins, rewards, giveaways, bundling top-ups, flash sales, bank promotions, etc.)

codelist.label_id: Agar voucher dapat sering  berfungsi saat digunakan
codelist.label_en: Ensure vouchers work properly when used

codelist.label_id: Agar dapat menghilangkan iklan pada aplikasi
codelist.label_en: Provide an option to remove ads in the app

codelist.label_id: Tambahkan point ke pelanggan apabila mengajak teman untuk top up
codelist.label_en: Add referral points when inviting friends to top up

codelist.label_id: Agar cashback dapat sering berfungsi saat digunakan
codelist.label_en: Ensure cashback works properly when used

codelist.label_id: Adakan turnamen mini / e-sport games untuk menarik customer
codelist.label_en: Hold tournaments or e-sports events to attract customers.

codelist.label_id: Ada top up tanpa biaya admin
codelist.label_en: Offer top-ups with no admin fee.

codelist.label_id: Agar promo disesuaikan dengan games yang sering dimainkan
codelist.label_en: Customize promotions based on the games users play most frequently.
Increase the number of reward-based events and promotions.

codelist.label_id: Agar ditambahkan rating dan ulasan yang bagus dari pengguna
codelist.label_en: Add user ratings and reviews to help build trust and provide better information for users.

verbatim_samples.verbatim: Buat lebih banyak kesempatan untuk dapet hadiahnya
Lebih banyak potongan harga atau cashback
Mungkin agen bisa diperbanyak. Jika perlu mengurangi penggunaan ai dalan chat
Adanya voucher diskon atau cashback gopay koin
Perbanyak variasi gamenya, berikan harga yang setidaknya bersaing dengan platform top up milik influencer
Nominal yang bisa kurang dari 10 ribu
Di tingkatkan lagi free free nya
